corrected_assertion: The mobile package is renamed to packages/mobile-patient as part of the Phase 3a scaffold split. Rationale: Phase 3c introduces a separate packages/mobile-clinician package (SwiftUI app for the clinician side of the encounter). The original mobile package handled only the patient side, so it is renamed to mobile-patient to disambiguate. All four files migrate at R100 similarity (identical content, just renamed path): index.js, package.json, demo/generate-patient-qr.html, demo/unlock-patient.sh. The package.json 'name' field changes from @memory-oracle/mobile to @memory-oracle/mobile-patient. All monorepo imports referencing @memory-oracle/mobile must update to @memory-oracle/mobile-patient.
source: git commit d771610 'feat(mobile-patient): Phase 3a scaffold — rename packages/mobile → packages/mobile-patient' 2026-05-31
